---
title: "CV"
---

Download my [full CV (PDF)](cv.pdf).

<!--
To make the link work, upload a file named cv.pdf to the root of the repo.
Until you do, the link will 404 — that's fine for now.

If you'd rather show CV content inline rather than linking a PDF,
replace everything below with markdown sections like:

## Positions
- 2024–present, Assistant Professor, Vrije Universiteit Amsterdam
- 2023–present, SNSF Ambizione Fellow, University of Geneva

## Education
- 2019, PhD in Political Science, University of Bern

etc.
-->
